<!--
SPDX-FileCopyrightText: 2026 Mercator Ocean International <https://www.mercator-ocean.eu/>

SPDX-License-Identifier: EUPL-1.2
-->

---
title: "Live evaluations"
format:
  html:
    echo: false
---

# Live evaluations

Live evaluations monitor recent operational forecasts against recent Class IV observations and GLO12 operational analysis.
They are intended for scientific validation and daily monitoring, not for annual benchmark ranking.

| System | Forecast init | Observation source | Observation cutoff | Report |
|--------|---------------|--------------------|--------------------|--------|
| GLONET | 2026-05-13 | `project-oceanbench/public/observations2026/` | 2026-05-23 | [Development report](reports/glonet.latest.global.report.html) |

The cutoff avoids the recent current-observation gap in the development observation bucket.
For local development, `python helper_scripts/generate_live_evaluation_notebook.py` creates a synthetic GLONET forecast bucket and a synthetic GLO12 consistency-reference bucket before writing the report notebook.
The real OCTO GLONET bucket currently keeps full forecast data only for the newest inits, so the fully observable 2026-05-13 forecast is represented synthetically on this branch.
